text:
Created attachment 228147
Options dialog

I cannot change the Icon Style, Icon Size, Visibility, Mouse settings in the  Options dialog. Options cannot be selected and applied.

FreeBSD 12.2 RELEASE-p10 amd64, KDE Plasma 5.22.5, KDE Frameworks 5.86, Qt 5.15.2, Libreoffice 7.2.1.2
